name: Karuturi Global Limited
summary: Karuturi Global Limited, together with its subsidiaries, produces, sells, and exports cut roses in India and internationally. The company processes and produces pulses, oil seeds, maize, rice, sugar, gherkins, baby corn, jalapenos, and bottled pickles, as well as produces and distributes plants. The company was formerly known as Karuturi Networks Limited and changed its name to Karuturi Global Limited in May 2008. Karuturi Global Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
